implemented.failure_policy: Missing or malformed immutable commit identity is classified source-unresolved rather than accepted.

limits: No successful Vercel deployment identity exists for the latest commit.
The contract test was committed but could not be executed in this connector-only run.
No iPhone Safari device retest was available.
falsification_route: Run npm run test:deployment-identity in a fresh checkout.
Deploy with VITE_GIT_COMMIT_SHA set to the exact immutable source commit.
Compare window.__MC_DEPLOYMENT_IDENTITY__.commit against the GitHub deployment commit.
Reject the deployment if the value is null, malformed, or mismatched.
